variables.comment: The total number of births in the world (B#30).
variables.equation: IF( TIME >= population_equilibrium_time , deaths , ( total_fertility * Population_15_To_44 * 0.5 / reproductive_lifetime ) )

variables.comment:
COMPENSATORY MULTIPLIER FROM PERCEIVED LIFE
		         EXPECTANCY (CMPLE#36).

variables.name: desired completed family size
variables.equation: IF( TIME >= zero_population_growth_time , 2, desired_completed_family_size_normal * family_response_to_social_norm * social_family_size_normal )

variables.comment:
FRACTION OF SERVICES ALLOCATED TO FERTILITY CONTROL

variables.name: maximum total fertility normal
variables.comment:

		         (MTFN#33)

variables.name: reproductive lifetime
variables.comment: The number of years people can reproduce (RLT#30.1)

variables.name: population equilibrium time
variables.comment:
The time at which, as a model test, the population

variables.name: zero population growth time
variables.comment:
TIME WHEN DESIRED FAMILY SIZE EQUALS 2 CHILDREN
		         (ZPGT#38.1)

variables.name: total fertility
variables.equation: MIN ( maximum_total_fertility , ( maximum_total_fertility * ( 1 - fertility_control_effectiveness ) + desired_total_fertility * fertility_control_effectiveness ) )

variables.name: deaths
variables.comment:
